p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T1]) { Set.new[Pair[T0, T1]](pair_set_contains[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = pair_set[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[T, U](left, right)
function[T0, T2](x0: Set[T0], x1: Pair[T0, T2], x2: Set[T2]) { (x1.first ∈ x0 and x1.second ∈ x2) = pair_set_contains[T0, T2](x0, x2, x1) }[T, U](left, p, right)
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: Set[T0], x1: Pair[T0, T1], x2: Set[T1]) { (x1.first ∈ x0 and x1.second ∈ x2) = pair_set_contains[T0, T1](x0, x2, x1) } }

function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.new[T0](x0) = x0(x1) }[Pair[T, U]](pair_set_contains[T, U](left, right), p)

not (Pair.new(x, y).first ∈ left and Pair.new(x, y).second ∈ right) or Pair.new(x, y) ∈ pair_set[T, U](left, right)

function(x0: T) { not (x0 ∈ left and not f(x0) ∈ left_target) }(p.first)
not p.first ∈ left or f(p.first) ∈ left_target
(forall(x0: U) { not x0 ∈ right or g(x0) ∈ right_target } = true)
function(x0: U) { not (x0 ∈ right and not g(x0) ∈ right_target) }(p.second)
not p.second ∈ right or g(p.second) ∈ right_target

goal: pair_map[T, U, V, W](f, g, p).first = f(p.first)

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: T2 -> T0, x1: T3 -> T1, x2: Pair[T2, T3]) { pair_map[T2, T3, T0, T1](x0, x1, x2).first = x0(x2.first) }[V, W, T, U](f, g, p)

goal: pair_map[T, U, V, W](f, g, p).second = g(p.second)

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: T2 -> T0, x1: T3 -> T1, x2: Pair[T2, T3]) { pair_map[T2, T3, T0, T1](x0, x1, x2).second = x1(x2.second) }[V, W, T, U](f, g, p)

goal: pair_set[V, W](left_target, right_target).contains(pair_map[T, U, V, W](f, g, p))
